sentence: 走廊的照明太暗，容易摔跤。
pinyin: Zǒuláng de zhàomíng tài àn, róngyì shuāijiāo.
english: The hallway lighting is too dim and it's easy to trip.

sentence: 他的别号是“老顽童”，朋友都这么叫他。
pinyin: Tā de biéhào shì “lǎo wántóng”, péngyǒu dōu zhème jiào tā.
english: His alias is \

meaning: 1. sleeveless garment (vest, waistcoat, singlet, tank top et
sentence: 天气太热了，他只穿了件背心。
pinyin: Tiān qì tài rè le, tā zhǐ chuān le jiàn bèi xīn.
english: It was too hot, so he just wore a tank top.

sentence: 农民在地里施了化肥，庄稼长得很好。
pinyin: Nóngmín zài dì lǐ shīle huàféi, zhuāngjia zhǎng de hěn hǎo.
english: The farmer applied chemical fertilizer to the field and the crops grew well.

sentence: 警察没收了他藏匿的枪支。
pinyin: Jǐngchá mòshōu le tā cángnì de qiāngzhī.
english: The police confiscated the guns he had hidden.

meaning: 1. to rank; 2. to grade; 3. to classify; 4. rank; 5. grade;
sentence: 这部电影被分级为适合成人观看。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànyǐng bèi fēnjí wéi shìhé chéngrén guānkàn.
english: This movie was classified as suitable for adult viewers.

sentence: 那座古庙里保存着精美的壁画。
pinyin: Nà zuò gǔ miào lǐ bǎo cún zhe jīng měi de bì huà.
english: That ancient temple preserves some exquisite murals.

sentence: 她每天早上都带狗狗去公园散步。
pinyin: Tā měi tiān zǎo shang dōu dài gǒu gǒu qù gōng yuán sàn bù.
english: She takes her dog to the park for a walk every morning.

sentence: 麦克风把声音转换成电信号。
pinyin: Màikèfēng bǎ shēngyīn zhuǎnhuàn chéng diànxìnhào.
english: A microphone converts sound into electrical signals.

meaning: assistance to the poor; poverty alleviation
sentence: 村里的扶贫项目帮很多家庭改善了生活。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ de fú pín xiàngmù bāng hěn duō jiātíng gǎishàn le shēnghuó.
english: The village poverty-alleviation program helped many families improve their lives.

sentence: 价格和销量往往成反比，这是基本规律。
pinyin: Jià gé hé xiāo liàng wǎng wǎng chéng fǎn bǐ, zhè shì jī běn guī lǜ.
english: Price and sales volume are often inversely proportional — that's a basic principle.

sentence: 这台打印机可以联网共享使用。
pinyin: Zhè tái dǎ yìn jī kě yǐ lián wǎng gòng xiǎng shǐ yòng.
english: This printer can be connected to the network for shared use.

meaning: (old) actress; adult film actress; AV actress
sentence: 她年轻时是一位知名女优，演过很多电影。
pinyin: Tā nián qīng shí shì yī wèi zhī míng nǚ yōu, yǎn guò hěn duō diàn yǐng.
english: When she was young she was a well-known actress who appeared in many films.

sentence: 这句广告语用了双关，既有趣又好记。
pinyin: Zhè jù guǎnggào yǔ yòng le shuāngguān, jì yǒuqù yòu hǎo jì.
english: This advertising slogan uses a pun, making it both fun and memorable.

sentence: 骑士靴上的马刺在石板路上发出清脆的声音。
pinyin: Qí shì xuē shàng de mǎ cì zài shí bǎn lù shàng fā chū qīng cuì de shēng yīn.
english: The spurs on the knight's boots made a crisp sound on the cobblestone road.

meaning: 1. to donate money; 2. to contribute funds; 3. donation; 4.
sentence: 他向慈善机构捐款了。
pinyin: Tā xiàng císhàn jīgòu juānkuǎn le.
english: He donated money to a charity.

sentence: 双方同意立即停火。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng tóngyì lìjí tínghuǒ.
english: Both sides agreed to an immediate ceasefire.

sentence: 农业集体化改变了农村的生产方式。
pinyin: Nóngyè jítǐhuà gǎibiànle nóngcūn de shēngchǎn fāngshì.
english: Agricultural collectivization changed the way production was organized in rural areas.

sentence: 手机支付让购物变得更加便捷。
pinyin: Shǒujī zhīfù ràng gòuwù biàn de gèngjiā biàn jié.
english: Mobile payment has made shopping much more convenient and fast.

sentence: 大家都觉得他是个人渣。
pinyin: Dàjiā dōu juéde tā shì gè rénzhā.
english: Everyone thinks he is scum.

sentence: 这套家具的设计很有美感。
pinyin: Zhè tào jiājù de shèjì hěn yǒu měigǎn.
english: The design of this furniture set has a great sense of beauty.

meaning: (coll.) to take (sth) as …; to treat as …; to assume; to act
sentence: 他说的话太难听了，我只当没听见。
pinyin: Tā shuō de huà tài nán tīng le, wǒ zhǐ dāng méi tīng jiàn.
english: What he said was so harsh that I just treated it as if I hadn't heard it.

sentence: 买房时可以用公积金贷款。
pinyin: Mǎi fáng shí kě yǐ yòng gōng jī jīn dài kuǎn.
english: You can use your housing fund to get a loan when buying a home.

sentence: 秘书把报告呈送给总经理。
pinyin: Mìshū bǎ bàogào chéngsòng gěi zǒng jīnglǐ.
english: The secretary presented the report to the general manager.

sentence: 氢和氧化合就会生成水。
pinyin: Qīng hé yǎng huàhé jiù huì shēngchéng shuǐ.
english: Hydrogen and oxygen combine chemically to form water.

meaning: arms and legs; the four limbs of the body
sentence: 每天运动可以让四肢更有力量。
pinyin: Měitiān yùndòng kěyǐ ràng sìzhī gèng yǒu lìliàng.
english: Exercising every day can make your limbs stronger.

sentence: 这辆卡车用柴油，不用汽油。
pinyin: Zhè liàng kǎchē yòng cháiyóu, bú yòng qìyóu.
english: This truck runs on diesel, not gasoline.

meaning: 1. to traffic narcotics; 2. drugs trade; 3. opium trade
sentence: 他因贩毒被判了十年。
pinyin: Tā yīn fàndú bèi pànle shí nián.
english: He was sentenced to ten years for drug trafficking.

sentence: 她不接受别人说她是女流之辈。
pinyin: Tā bù jiēshòu biérén shuō tā shì nǚliú zhī bèi.
english: She does not accept being dismissed as just a woman.

sentence: 他在会上做了检讨，承认自己工作中的失误。
pinyin: Tā zài huì shàng zuò le jiǎn tǎo, chéng rèn zì jǐ gōng zuò zhōng de shī wù.
english: He gave a self-criticism at the meeting and admitted his mistakes at work.

sentence: 公司明天上午召开用户座谈会。
pinyin: Gōngsī míngtiān shàngwǔ zhàokāi yònghù zuòtánhuì.
english: The company is holding a user symposium tomorrow morning.

sentence: 提高生产率是工厂的首要目标。
pinyin: Tígāo shēngchǎnlǜ shì gōngchǎng de shǒuyào mùbiāo.
english: Improving productivity is the factory's top priority.

sentence: 这件事由张经理经办，你找他就行。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn shì yóu Zhāng jīng lǐ jīng bàn, nǐ zhǎo tā jiù xíng.
english: This matter is being handled by Manager Zhang — just go find him.

sentence: 这条新闻的可信度值得怀疑。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo xīnwén de kěxìndù zhídé huáiyí.
english: The credibility of this news report is questionable.

sentence: 她不喜欢去夜店，觉得太吵。
pinyin: Tā bù xǐhuān qù yèdiàn, juéde tài chǎo.
english: She doesn't like going to nightclubs; she finds them too noisy.

meaning: 1. to donate; 2. to contribute; 3. donation; 4. contribution
sentence: 她决定捐献自己的眼角膜。
pinyin: Tā juédìng juānxiàn zìjǐ de yǎnjiǎomó.
english: She decided to donate her corneas.

sentence: 他们三个约法三章，以后不能迟到。
pinyin: Tāmen sān gè yuē fǎ sān zhāng, yǐhòu bù néng chídào.
english: The three of them agreed on a set of rules — no more being late from now on.

meaning: 1. attached externally (e.g. fuel tank); 2. plug-in; 3. add-
sentence: 用外挂作弊会被封号。
pinyin: Yòng wàiguà zuòbì huì bèi fēng hào.
english: Using cheat software will get your account banned.

sentence: 他在官场混了很多年。
pinyin: Tā zài guānchǎng hùn le hěn duō nián.
english: He has been in officialdom for many years.

sentence: 妈妈在阳台上种了几盆兰花。
pinyin: Māma zài yángtái shàng zhòng le jǐ pén lánhuā.
english: Mom planted several pots of orchids on the balcony.

sentence: 她每晚睡前都会祷告。
pinyin: Tā měi wǎn shuì qián dōu huì dǎogào.
english: She prays every night before going to sleep.

sentence: 孩子伸手触摸了那朵花。
pinyin: Háizi shēn shǒu chùmō le nà duǒ huā.
english: The child reached out and touched that flower.

meaning: valve (esp. tire valve); accelerator (obsolete term for 油門|油
sentence: 自行车轮胎没气了，检查一下气门。
pinyin: Zìxíngchē lúntāi méi qì le, jiǎnchá yīxià qìmén.
english: The bicycle tire is flat — check the valve.

sentence: 老师在课堂上展开了一张世界地图。
pinyin: Lǎoshī zài kètáng shàng zhǎnkāi le yī zhāng shìjiè dìtú.
english: The teacher unfolded a world map in class.

sentence: 这两条路在这里交叉。
pinyin: Zhè liǎng tiáo lù zài zhèlǐ jiāo chā.
english: These two roads intersect here.

sentence: 历史上每一位改革者都面临过很大的阻力。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shàng měi yī wèi gǎigézhě dōu miànlín guò hěn dà de zǔlì.
english: Every reformer in history has faced tremendous resistance.

sentence: 新工作的薪资比以前高出不少。
pinyin: Xīn gōngzuò de xīnzī bǐ yǐqián gāochū bù shǎo.
english: The salary at the new job is considerably higher than before.

meaning: 1. to inhabit a region (esp. ethnic group); 2. to congregate
sentence: 这个地区有许多少数民族聚居于此。
pinyin: Zhè ge dì qū yǒu xǔ duō shǎo shù mín zú jù jū yú cǐ.
english: Many ethnic minority groups inhabit this region.

meaning: (attributive) (of a person) involved in sensitive, confident
sentence: 这份机要文件不能随便传阅。
pinyin: Zhè fèn jī yào wén jiàn bù néng suí biàn chuán yuè.
english: This confidential document must not be passed around casually.

sentence: 他始终保有对学习的热情。
pinyin: Tā shǐzhōng bǎo yǒu duì xuéxí de rèqíng.
english: He has always retained his enthusiasm for learning.
